preferences.name: OPEN_AI_API_KEY
preferences.title: Open AI - API KEY
preferences.description: Your private API KEY for the Search Engine.

preferences.name: WORKSPACE_PATH
preferences.title: Workspace path
preferences.description: The workspace path you are going to index

preferences.name: LOCAL_AI_ANSWERS
preferences.title: Get local AI answers
preferences.description: User preference about AI response locally (Ollama) or external (API KEY)

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
